name: Grandeur
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

When dealing damage with an Attack Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' against targets with 10+ ([Sinking] Potency + Count), inflict 2 [Sinking] Potency and +2 [Sinking] Count at Attack End (2 times per turn per Identity)
In Focused Encounters: inflict 4 [Sinking] Potency and +2 [Sinking] Count instead (once per turn per Identity)

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

When dealing damage with an Attack Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' against targets with 8+ ([Sinking] Potency + Count), inflict 3 [Sinking] Potency and +2 [Sinking] Count at Attack End (2 times per turn per Identity)
In Focused Encounters: inflict 5 [Sinking] Potency and +2 [Sinking] Count instead (once per turn per Identity)

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

When dealing damage with an Attack Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking' against targets with 5+ ([Sinking] Potency + Count), inflict 3 [Sinking] Potency and +3 [Sinking] Count at Attack End (2 times per turn per Identity)
In Focused Encounters: inflict 5 [Sinking] Potency and +3 [Sinking] Count instead (once per turn per Identity)
